text.title: SERP Alert Rules — Output Contract
text.summary: Schemas for serp-alerts.yaml (config), the per-alert payload, and the investigation log.

forbidden.pattern: rules map missing any of the five named rules
routing.immediate accepts long-tail queries — defeats r4
baseline_window.end older than 7 days from now without refresh
investigation_log entry without root_cause filled at resolution

allowed-transformations.transformation: Tighten thresholds per query priority over time as confidence grows.
Add new signals (e.g. featured-snippet ownership) by extending rules without removing the five required ones.
Promote a long-tail query to body band when it starts driving revenue; record the promotion in the priority history.

list.item: All five rules present with explicit thresholds
Routing differentiates immediate vs digest vs weekly
Investigation log filled to root cause for each closed alert
AI Overview snapshots captured for diff (screenshot or HTML)
